source_note: Chinese hot-topic candidates are collected from public trend pages; English wording is matched to supplied official English headlines when possible, otherwise suggested neutrally.

topics.chinese_topic: 多所“双一流”高校宣布扩招
topics.official_english: Multiple 'Double First-Class' universities announce enrollment expansion
topics.why_hot: Education policy directly affects millions of students and families; expansion of top universities signals major shift in higher education access.
topics.share_angle: Explain what 'Double First-Class' means and how expansion could impact college admission rates and educational equity.

topics.why_hot: New infrastructure is a key economic driver; 'six networks' concept outlines China's tech and digital development priorities.
topics.share_angle: Break down the six networks (e.g., 5G, AI, data centers) and their role in China's economic transformation.

topics.chinese_topic: 伊朗用AI让球员牵遇难儿童入场
topics.official_english: Iran uses AI to have players escort deceased children onto field
topics.why_hot: Combines World Cup, AI technology, and humanitarian gesture; sparks discussion on ethics and innovation.
topics.share_angle: Describe how AI was used to create virtual images of children killed in accidents, and the public reaction to this tribute.

topics.chinese_topic: 新能源车该不该承担“养护费”
topics.official_english: Should new energy vehicles bear 'maintenance fees'?
topics.why_hot: As EV adoption grows, debate over road maintenance costs and tax fairness becomes a livelihood issue.
topics.share_angle: Compare traditional fuel taxes vs. EV fees, and explain the policy debate in China and globally.

topics.chinese_topic: 博主编造涉货车司机与货主谣言被罚
topics.official_english: Blogger fined for fabricating rumors about truck drivers and cargo owners
topics.why_hot: Highlights crackdown on online misinformation, relevant to free speech and platform responsibility.
topics.share_angle: Discuss the case details and broader implications for rumor control and social media regulation in China.

topics.chinese_topic: 多方回应13岁学生被误诊艾滋病
topics.official_english: Multiple parties respond to misdiagnosis of HIV in 13-year-old student
topics.why_hot: Medical misdiagnosis of a minor raises serious public health and trust concerns.
topics.share_angle: Explain the incident, the responses from hospitals and authorities, and the importance of diagnostic accuracy.

topics.official_english: World Cup: Spain vs. Cape Verde
topics.why_hot: World Cup match featuring a major team vs. a debutant; generates sports excitement and underdog story.
topics.share_angle: Preview the match, highlight Cape Verde's historic first World Cup appearance, and discuss Spain's chances.

topics.chinese_topic: 雷军在武汉给青年两点忠告
topics.official_english: Lei Jun gives two pieces of advice to youth in Wuhan
topics.why_hot: Lei Jun is a prominent tech entrepreneur; his advice resonates with young people and entrepreneurs.
topics.share_angle: Summarize his advice (e.g., focus on long-term goals, embrace failure) and relate to startup culture.
